release_notes: v2.6.0 Official Workflow Examples & Desktop UI Polish
Official workflow examples: csv-analysis-report, prompt-improvement-review, starter-greeting-workflow, analytics-pack-checkup
Workflow discovery: list_workflows includes examples/workflows/, discover_workflows finds workflows
CLI commands: liuant skills workflow discover, validate --workflow-id
Desktop workflow UI: Workflow Templates section with cards showing preview, permissions, dry-run/run, audit history
URL staging confirmation flow: URL input, preview, staged_id, validation, import, install
Lint fix suggestions UI: score, grade, issues, recommendations, safe fixes
Recommendation ranking UI: score, reason, factor breakdown, risk summary, trust state
Chat-first workflow bridge: preview, permissions, audit, dry-run, rerun plan intents
Safety: No marketplace server, no cloud sync, no auto-install, no auto-enable, no auto-run
815 tests pass, TypeScript clean, frontend builds clean
